choices.text: 7700 emergency, 7600 lost comm, 7500 hijack. Also 1200 = VFR default. Squawking these alerts ATC immediately. Avoid accidentally cycling through during code changes.

ADS-B Out replacing radar. Aircraft broadcasts GPS position 1Hz; 200+ NM range; more accurate than radar; required since 2020 in controlled airspace. ADS-B In gives free traffic + weather to cockpit. FAA decommissioning radar.
